pi_items.source: Web search and direct fetch of https://crawler-test.com/ confirmed it is a real, working website designed as a comprehensive test suite for web crawlers, including multiple redirect loop test cases (e.g., /redirects/infinite_redirect, /redirects/two_step_redirect_loop_1). See https://crawler-test.com/
Task setup script (setup_task.sh lines 27-30) confirms creation of /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports directory and clearing of redirect_loops.csv. Consistent with typical SEO tool export patterns.
Task setup script (setup_task.sh lines 28-30) confirms creation of /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports directory and clearing of loop_analysis.txt. Consistent with typical report output patterns.

Official Screaming Frog documentation (https://www.screamingfrog.co.uk/seo-spider/user-guide/tabs/) lists 'Redirect Loop' as a standard Response Codes tab filter option: 'URLs in redirect chains that loop back to previous URLs'. Task description (task.json line 5) explicitly directs: 'Navigate to the Response Codes tab and use the filter dropdown to select Redirect Loop'.

Web search for 'loop_to_self' returned zero results. Not found in official Screaming Frog documentation (https://www.screamingfrog.co.uk/), not present on crawler-test.com website paths or test cases (fetched from https://crawler-test.com/), and not mentioned in task description. Verifier.py checks for this string in CSV (line 84), but no evidence this is a real field name or status code.

Web search for 'loop_to_other' returned zero results. Not found in official Screaming Frog documentation (https://www.screamingfrog.co.uk/), not present on crawler-test.com website paths or test cases (fetched from https://crawler-test.com/), and not mentioned in task description. Verifier.py checks for this string in CSV (line 86), but no evidence this is a real field name or status code.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets crawler-test.com, a real website providing comprehensive test cases for web crawlers including redirect loop scenarios. Screaming Frog SEO Spider is a real commercial tool with a 'Redirect Loop' filter in its Response Codes tab that identifies URLs in circular redirect chains. The expected CSV and report file paths are reasonable locations for SEO tool outputs. The metadata includes 'Redirect Loop' as a loop indicator, which is verified as a genuine Screaming Frog feature. However, metadata also lists 'loop_to_self' and 'loop_to_other' as loop indicators, which cannot be verified in official Screaming Frog documentation, crawler-test.com content, or any publicly available sources and may represent unverified or fabricated metadata claims.
